choices.name: Advanced
choices.choiceText: Advanced - I know how to use LIMS system and could lead and train others

choices.name: Intermediate
choices.choiceText: Intermediate - I would require a brief introduction and then would be comfortable using it

choices.name: Limited
choices.choiceText: Limited - I would require a complete refresh or assistance using it

value.stringValue: NHS Test and Trace - Uni Placement

fields.name: Completion_Text
fields.fieldText:
Submitted!

Thank you for submitting your interest in the work placement opportunities at the NHS Test and Trace mega lab in Leamington Spa.


Your application is being reviewed by our recruitment team and we’ll be in touch soon with more information.


We thank you for your interest in these opportunities.


The NHS Test and Trace team

fields.name: Data_Text
fields.fieldText:
Data Privacy Statement


Click Here to find information on the full privacy policy for the TT laboratory jobs website, an Impellam Group website (“Our Site”). The privacy notice sets out how to request an update to your marketing preferences and how Impellam Group entities Medacs Global Group Limited, Science Recruitment Group Limited and Blue Arrow Limited will manage personal data submitted via the TT laboratory jobs website and registration process.

fields.name: Privacy_Agreement
fields.fieldText: By selecting ”I agree” you confirm that you have read, understand and consent to the Data Privacy Statement

validationRule.errorMessage: Email must be in a valid format

fields.name: University
fields.fieldText: Which university are you currently studying at?

fields.name: Error_Uni
fields.fieldText: You must select a University from the list above

fields.name: Degree_Subject
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the subject of your degree

fields.name: Accessibility_Requirements
fields.fieldText: Do you have any accessibility requirements? Please note this will not affect your application

fields.name: Accessibility_Requirement_Details
fields.fieldText: Please provide further details - please note we may ask more around this on the telephone screen to ensure we can make any reasonable adjustments that may be required:

fields.name: Placement_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: When will you be looking to begin your placement role? (to the nearest month)

fields.name: Welcome_Text
fields.fieldText:
Application for National Testing Programme


As part of supporting efforts to reopen society and the economy, NHS Test and Trace is expanding our network of laboratories across the UK. This expansion has created an exceptional opportunity for both experienced scientists and those wanting to embark on a career within a laboratory environment. Our laboratories have access to the latest equipment and offer a truly unique and supportive environment.


We need a broad range of skillsets to support the expansion of the laboratories, from entry level positions for new graduates and those with good A levels to positions running our laboratories. We understand that in these current times our workforce requires flexibility and as such we can offer contracting, fixed term or permanent posts. The workforce will be deployed as part of the broader NHS Test and Trace programme.


The need to increase our testing capacity is immediate, so we can offer employment in a variety of roles nationwide, at very competitive pay rates with opportunities to broaden your experience and be part of a truly phenomenal initiative. 


Our laboratories will continue to expand over the coming months, accessing the very latest technology and scientific resources to support our community. This requires ongoing training and development which is delivered onsite by our experienced team members.


This is an exciting opportunity to work on the cutting edge of supporting the COVID-19 recovery efforts, to help reopen society and the economy. Our laboratory teams are critical to the success of the Programme. To register your interest in a full-time or part-time role at a COVID-19 laboratory, please begin your application now.


Please note, although this portal is operated on behalf of NHS Test and Trace, employment opportunities are through third party suppliers such as Lighthouse Labs and specialist workforce providers
